cancellation_policies.name: Free Cancellation up to 24 Hours Before
cancellation_policies.description: Cancel or modify your tee time for a full refund up to 24 hours before the scheduled start time. No refunds within 24 hours of play.

cancellation_policies.name: Flexible 12-Hour Policy with Partial Late Refund
cancellation_policies.description: Enjoy free cancellation up to 12 hours before your tee time. Cancellations within 12 hours receive a 50% credit toward a future booking.

cancellation_policies.name: Non-Refundable Rate
cancellation_policies.description: This special rate is non-refundable and cannot be changed once booked. No refunds or credits will be issued for cancellations or no-shows.

cancellation_policies.name: 50% Refund up to 48 Hours Before
cancellation_policies.description: Cancel up to 48 hours before your tee time to receive a 50% refund. No refunds are available within 48 hours of the scheduled start time.

promo_codes.description: Save 10% on eligible golf packages and multi-round passes.
15% off select tee times during weekday mornings.
New customer promo: 20% off your first tee time booking. (Expired)
$25 off high-value golf purchases. Currently disabled.

packages.name: SoCal Saver 10-Round Pass
packages.description: Value-focused 10-round pass valid at select Southern California courses for any day of the week, with limited blackout dates.

packages.name: SoCal Elite 12-Round Bundle
packages.description: Premium 12-round bundle with weekend priority access at top-rated Southern California courses.

packages.name: Orlando Weekday 10-Round Card
packages.description: Weekday-only 10-round card valid at participating Orlando-area resort and public courses.

packages.name: Las Vegas Stay & Play 10-Round Pack
packages.description: Flexible 10-round package tailored for Vegas visitors, with access to both resort and desert layouts.

packages.name: Phoenix Twilight 8-Round Pass
packages.description: Beat the heat with 8 discounted twilight rounds at participating Phoenix-area courses after 3pm.

packages.name: Chicago Foursome 16-Round Pack
packages.description: Designed for regular groups, this pack covers 4 foursome outings (16 individual rounds) at selected Chicago-area tracks.

packages.name: Dallas Morning 12-Round Saver
packages.description: 12 early-bird rounds usable before 11am on weekdays at participating Dallas-area courses.

packages.name: LA Destination 10-Round Explorer
packages.description: Explore destination-style layouts 25–60 miles from Los Angeles with this 10-round explorer pass.

packages.name: SoCal Budget 5-Round Punch Card
packages.description: Entry-level 5-round punch card for budget-conscious golfers in Southern California.

packages.name: Florida Seasonal Unlimited Pass
packages.description: Season-long access with up to 40 rounds at participating Florida resort and public courses, subject to 2-rounds-per-day limit.

packages.name: National Elite 20-Round Passport
packages.description: High-end 20-round passport redeemable at a curated list of championship courses across the U.S.

packages.name: Legacy 10-Round Classic Pass (Expired)
packages.description: Archived 10-round pass that is no longer available for purchase but may appear in older bookings.

packages.name: SoCal Promo 10-Round Trial
packages.description: Promotional 10-round trial pass with limited course selection and tighter blackout windows.

packages.name: Orlando Resort 12-Round Experience
packages.description: Twelve rounds at upscale resort-style courses in the greater Orlando area, including weekend availability.

courses.name: San Diego Bayview Golf Club
courses.description: Scenic coastal layout overlooking the bay with forgiving fairways and fast poa annua greens.

courses.name: San Diego Canyon Pines
courses.description: Challenging canyon course with elevation changes and strategic bunkering just inland from the coast.
courses.full_address: 455 Canyon Pines Rd, San Diego, CA 92130

courses.name: San Diego Municipal Links
courses.description: City-run muni with walkable routing and great value for casual golfers.

courses.name: Dallas Lakes Golf Club
courses.description: Parkland-style course wrapped around a series of lakes, popular for early-morning play.

courses.name: Dallas Trail Creek
courses.description: Rolling fairways along a creek bed with multiple tee box options and strong weekday deals.

courses.name: North Dallas Creekside
courses.description: Affordable daily-fee layout with generous fairways and a friendly clubhouse.

courses.name: Seattle Ridge Golf Club
courses.description: Tree-lined Pacific Northwest layout with views of the Cascades and a demanding back nine.

courses.name: Seattle Harbor Links
courses.description: Compact course near the water ideal for 9-hole twilight rounds and quick loops.

courses.name: Orlando Palms Resort Course
courses.description: Resort-style championship layout with water on 14 holes and pristine conditioning.

courses.name: Orlando Grand Oaks
courses.description: Rolling fairways framed by live oaks and wetlands within a short drive of the theme parks.

courses.name: Orlando Lakeside Resort Golf
courses.description: Upscale resort course circling a large central lake with immaculate greens.

courses.name: Phoenix Desert Municipal
courses.description: Budget-friendly desert-style muni with firm fairways and open tee sheet for locals.

courses.name: Valley View Golf Center
courses.description: Shorter par-70 layout near downtown Phoenix with an excellent practice facility.
courses.full_address: 4550 N Valley View Rd, Phoenix, AZ 85012

courses.name: Chicago Lakeside Links
courses.description: Wind-exposed lakeside track with skyline views and a strong weekend following.

courses.name: Prairie Dunes of Chicago
courses.description: Inland links-inspired course with native fescue and large undulating greens.

courses.name: Vegas Canyon Golf Club
courses.description: Dramatic canyon holes and desert scenery just off the Las Vegas Strip.
courses.full_address: 300 Canyon Vista Dr, Las Vegas, NV 89135

courses.name: Las Vegas Desert Dunes
courses.description: Value-focused desert course with generous fairways and wide-open views.
courses.full_address: 880 Desert Dunes Rd, Las Vegas, NV 89131

courses.name: Los Angeles City Municipal
courses.description: Classic city muni convenient to downtown LA with walkable routing and affordable rates.
courses.full_address: 1000 City Golf Dr, Los Angeles, CA 90012

courses.name: LA Desert Resort Course
courses.description: Destination-style desert resort course east of Los Angeles, ideal for day trips with mid-range green fees.
